description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration v2 that runs on a schedule, on workflow dispatch, and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: CI, Documentation, and Formatting. The CI job runs on a matrix of operating systems, configurations, and Vulkan versions, and performs steps such as checking out code, caching and installing Vulkan SDK, setting up C++, building, and testing. The Documentation job generates documentation on Ubuntu and the Formatting job checks code formatting using clang-format.
